title: Review: wallet round 18
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — Two structural problems: (1) Orchard key generation and UA encoding exist but Orchard scanning is absent, so the wallet silently drops all Orchard payments while advertising Orchard addresses. (2) spawn_scanner has no reconnect logic despite the LightwalletdClient doc explicitly saying reconnect is the caller's responsibility, meaning any gRPC error permanently freezes scanning until process restart.
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty: (1) no integration test that scans a real/mock block containing a Sapling output and finds it in spendable_notes — the happy path only tests insert_spendable_note which bypasses scanner logic entirely; (2) Orchard spend path is unimplemented and untested; (3) gRPC reconnect behavior under partial failures is untested. Would raise confidence with: integration test scanning a mock compact block stream against SaplingIvkDecryptor.
